violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Uncovered food items in the coolers and freezers need to be covered.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Stacks of plates not inverted.
Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. -Silverware in the holders need to be handle up.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust buildup on the vent in the dish washing area.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. -Fly strips hanging in a dish wash/clean dish area.
